title.value: 1. What ProductX CompanyY is and what it is used for

display.value: 1. What X is and what it is used for

p.span: ProductX CompanyY
is a medicine containing an active substance called imatinib. This medicine works by inhibiting the growth of abnormal cells in the diseases listed below. These include some types of cancer.

strong.span: ProductX CompanyY is a treatment for adults and children for:

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;

ul.li: Chronic myeloid leukaemia (CML). Leukaemia is a cancer of white blood cells. These white cells usually help the body to fight infection. Chronic myeloid leukaemia is a form of leukaemia in which certain abnormal white cells (named myeloid cells) start growing out of control.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 1.65pt 0px; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;

strong.span: Philadelphia chromosome positive acute lymphoblastic leukaemia (Ph-positive ALL)

li.span: . Leukaemia is a cancer of white blood cells. These white cells usually help the body to fight infection. Acute lymphoblastic leukaemia is a form of leukaemia in which certain abnormal white cells (named lymphoblasts) start growing out of control. ProductX CompanyY inhibits the growth of these cells.

p.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 1.65pt; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

strong.span: ProductX CompanyY is also a treatment for adults for:

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 1.65pt 0px; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: These are a group of blood diseases in which some blood cells start growing out of control. ProductX CompanyY inhibits the growth of these cells in a certain subtype of these diseases.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 1.65pt 0px; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;

strong.span: Hypereosinophilic syndrome (HES) and/or chronic eosinophilic leukaemia (CEL).

li.span: These are blood diseases in which some blood cells (named eosinophils) start growing out of control. ProductX CompanyY inhibits the growth of these cells in a certain subtype of these diseases.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 1.65pt 0px; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: GIST is a cancer of the stomach and bowels. It arises from uncontrolled cell growth of the supporting tissues of these organs.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: DFSP is a cancer of the tissue beneath the skin in which some cells start growing out of control. ProductX CompanyY inhibits the growth of these cells.

p.span: In the rest of this leaflet, we will use the abbreviations when talking about these diseases.
If you have any questions about how ProductX CompanyY works or why this medicine has been prescribed for you, ask your doctor.

title.value: 2. What you need to know before you take ProductX CompanyY

display.value: 2. What you need to know before you [take] [use] X

p.span: ProductX CompanyY
will only be prescribed to you by a doctor with experience in medicines to treat blood cancers

span.style: font-size: 10.0pt; font-family: Helvetica, sans-serif; color: black;

p.span: or solid tumours.
Follow all your doctor’s instructions carefully, even if they differ from the general information contained in this leaflet.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: if you are allergic to imatinib or any of the other ingredients of this medicine (listed in section 6).

p.span: If this applies to you, tell your doctor without taking ProductX CompanyY.
If you think you may be allergic but are not sure, ask your doctor for advice.
Talk to your doctor before taking ProductX CompanyY:

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: if you have or have ever had a liver, kidney or heart problem.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: if you are taking the medicine levothyroxine because your thyroid has been removed.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;

ul.li: if you have ever had or might now have a hepatitis B infection. This is because ProductX CompanyY could cause hepatitis B to become active again, which can be fatal in some cases. Patients will be carefully checked by their doctor for signs of this infection before treatment is started.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: if you experience bruising, bleeding, fever, fatigue and confusion when taking ProductX CompanyY, contact your doctor. This may be a sign of damage to blood vessels known as thrombotic microangiopathy (TMA).

p.span: If any of these apply to you, tell your doctor before taking ProductX CompanyY.

You may become more sensitive to the sun while taking ProductX CompanyY. It is important to cover sun-exposed areas of skin and use sunscreen with high sun protection factor (SPF). These precautions are also applicable to children.

strong.span: During treatment with ProductX CompanyY, tell your doctor straight away

p.span: if you put on weight very quickly. ProductX CompanyY may cause your body to retain water (severe fluid retention).
While you are taking ProductX CompanyY your doctor will regularly check whether the medicine is working. You will also have blood tests and be weighed regularly.

div.p: ProductX CompanyY is also a treatment for children and adolescents with CML. There is no experience in children with CML below 2 years of age. There is limited experience in children with Ph-positive ALL and very limited experience in children with MDS/MPD, DFSP, GIST and HES/CEL.

p.span: Some children and adolescents taking ProductX CompanyY may have slower than normal growth. The doctor will monitor the growth at regular visits.

Tell your doctor or pharmacist if you are taking, have recently taken or might take any other medicines, including medicines obtained without a prescription (such as paracetamol) and including herbal medicines (such as St. John’s Wort). Some medicines can interfere with the effect of ProductX CompanyY when taken together. They may increase or decrease the effect of ProductX CompanyY, either leading to increased side effects or making ProductX CompanyY less effective. ProductX CompanyY may do the same to some other medicines.
Tell your doctor if you are using medicines that prevent the formation of blood clots.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: If you are pregnant or breast-feeding, think you may be pregnant or are planning to have a baby, ask your doctor for advice before taking this medicine.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: ProductX CompanyY
is not recommended during pregnancy unless clearly necessary as it may harm your baby. Your doctor will discuss with you the possible risks of taking ProductX CompanyY during pregnancy.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: Women who might become pregnant are advised to use effective contraception during treatment
and for 15 days after ending treatment

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: Do not breast-feed during the treatment with ProductX CompanyY
and for 15 days after ending treatment, as it may harm your baby

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: Patients who are concerned about their fertility while taking ProductX CompanyY are advised to consult with their doctor.

p.span: You may feel dizzy or drowsy or get blurred vision while taking this medicine. If this happens, do not drive or use any tools or machines until you are feeling well again.
Your doctor has prescribed ProductX CompanyY because you suffer from a serious condition. ProductX CompanyY can help you to fight this condition.

However, always take this medicine exactly as your doctor, pharmacist or nurse has told you. It is important that you do this as long as your doctor, pharmacist or nurse tells you to. Check with your doctor, pharmacist or nurse if you are not sure.

Do not stop taking ProductX CompanyY unless your doctor tells you to. If you are not able to take the medicine as your doctor prescribed or you feel you do not need it anymore, contact your doctor straight away.

title.value: How much ProductX CompanyY to take

p.span: Your doctor will tell you exactly how many capsules of ProductX CompanyY to take.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

strong.span: If you are being treated for CML:

p.style: margin: 0.05pt -1pt 0.0001pt 1cm; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
p.span: D
epending on your condition the usual starting dose is either 400 mg or 600 mg:

li.style: margin: 0.55pt -1pt 0.0001pt 13.7953px; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: t
o be taken as 4 capsules once a day,

li.style: margin: 0.55pt -1pt 0.0001pt 13.7953px; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: t
o be taken as 6 capsules once a day.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

strong.span: If you are being treated for GIST:

p.style: margin: 0.55pt -1pt 0.0001pt 1cm; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
p.span: The starting dose is 400 mg, to be taken as 4 capsules once a day.

For CML and GIST, your doctor may prescribe a higher or lower dose depending on how you respond to the treatment. If your daily dose is 800 mg (8 capsules), you should take 4 capsules in the morning and 4 capsules in the evening.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

strong.span: If you are being treated for Ph-positive ALL:

p.style: text-indent: 1cm; line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
p.span: The starting dose is 600 mg to be taken as 6 capsules once a day.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

strong.span: If you are being treated for MDS/MPD:

p.style: text-indent: 1cm; line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
p.span: The starting dose is 400 mg, to be taken as 4 capsules once a day.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

strong.span: If you are being treated for HES/CEL:

p.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 1cm; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
p.span: The starting dose is 100 mg, to be taken as 1 capsule once a day. Your doctor may decide to increase the dose to 400 mg, to be taken as 4 capsules once a day, depending on how you respond to treatment.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

strong.span: If you are being treated for DFSP:

p.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 1cm; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
p.span: The dose is 800 mg per day (8 capsules), to be taken as 4 capsules in the morning and 4 capsules in the evening.

span.style: font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; color: black;

p.span: The doctor will tell you how many capsules of ProductX CompanyY to give to your child. The amount of ProductX CompanyY given will depend on your child’s condition, body weight and height. The total daily dose in children and adolescents must not exceed 800 mg
with CML

span.style: font-size: 11.0pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; color: black;

p.span: and 600 mg with Ph+ALL. The treatment can either be given to your child as a once‑daily dose or alternatively the daily dose can be split into two administrations (half in the morning and half in the evening).

title.value: When and how to take ProductX CompanyY

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;

strong.span: Take ProductX CompanyY with a meal.

li.span: This will help protect you from stomach problems when taking ProductX CompanyY.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;

strong.span: Swallow the capsules whole with a large glass of water.

li.span: Do not open or crush the capsules unless you have difficulty in swallowing (e.g. in children).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: If you are unable to swallow the capsules, you can open them up and pour the powder into a glass of still water or apple juice.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: If you are a woman who is pregnant or might get pregnant and are trying to open the capsules, you should handle the contents with caution in order to avoid skin-eye contact or inhalation. You should wash your hands immediately after opening the capsules.

title.value: How long to take ProductX CompanyY

p.span: Keep taking ProductX CompanyY every day for as long as your doctor tells you.

title.value: If you take more ProductX CompanyY than you should

p.span: If you have accidentally taken too many capsules, talk to your doctor straight away. You may require medical attention. Take the medicine pack with you.

title.value: If you forget to take ProductX CompanyY

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: If you forget a dose, take it as soon as you remember. However if it is nearly time for the next dose, skip the missed dose.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: Then continue with your normal schedule.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;
li.span: Do not take a double dose to make up a forgotten dose.

p.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 1cm; text-indent: -1cm; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

p.span: If you have any further questions on the use of this medicine, ask your doctor, pharmacist or nurse.
Like all medicines, this medicine can cause side effects, although not everybody gets them. They are usually mild to moderate.

strong.span: Some side effects may be serious. Tell your doctor straight away if you get any of the following:

p.span: may affect more than 1 in 10 people)
may affect up to 1 in 10 people

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Rapid weight gain. ProductX CompanyY may cause your body to retain water (severe fluid retention).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Signs of infection such as fever, severe chills, sore throat or mouth ulcers. ProductX CompanyY can reduce the number of white blood cells, so you might get infections more easily.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Unexpected bleeding or bruising (when you have not hurt yourself).

p.span: may affect up to 1 in 100 people)
may affect up to 1 in 1,000 people)

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Chest pain, irregular heart rhythm (signs of heart problems).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Cough, having difficulty breathing or painful breathing (signs of lung problems).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Feeling light-headed, dizzy or fainting (signs of low blood pressure).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Feeling sick (nausea), with loss of appetite, dark-coloured urine, yellow skin or eyes (signs of liver problems).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Rash, red skin with blisters on the lips, eyes, skin or mouth, peeling skin, fever, raised red or purple skin patches, itching, burning sensation, pustular eruption (signs of skin problems).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Severe abdominal pain, blood in your vomit, stools or urine, black stools (signs of gastrointestinal disorders).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Severely decreased urine output, feeling thirsty (signs of kidney problems).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Feeling sick (nausea) with diarrhoea and vomiting, abdominal pain or fever (signs of bowel problems).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Severe headache, weakness or paralysis of limbs or face, difficulty speaking, sudden loss of consciousness (signs of nervous system problems
such as bleeding or swelling in skull/brain).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Pale skin, feeling tired and breathlessness and having dark urine (signs of low levels of red blood cells).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Eye pain or deterioration in vision
, bleeding in the eyes

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Pain in bones or joints (signs of osteonecrosis).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Blisters on skin or mucous membranes (signs of pemphigus).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Numb or cold toes and fingers (signs of Raynaud’s syndrome).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Sudden swelling and redness of the skin (signs of a skin infection called cellulitis).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Difficulty hearing.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Muscle weakness and spasms with an abnormal heart rhythm (signs of changes in the amount of potassium in your blood).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Bruising.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Stomach pain with feeling sick (nausea).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Muscle spasms with a fever, red-brown urine, pain or weakness in your muscles (signs of muscle problems).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Pelvic pain sometimes with nausea and vomiting, with unexpected vaginal bleeding, feeling dizzy or fainting due to low blood pressure (signs of problems with your ovaries or womb).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

ul.li: Nausea, shortness of breath, irregular heartbeat, clouding of urine, tiredness and/or joint discomfort associated with abnormal laboratory test results (e.g. high potassium, uric acid and calcium levels and low phosphorous levels in the blood).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Blood clots in small blood vessels (thrombotic microangiopathy).

p.span: frequency cannot be estimated from the available data):

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

ul.li: Combination of a widespread severe rash, feeling sick, fever, high level of certain white blood cells or yellow skin or eyes (signs of jaundice) with breathlessness, chest pain/discomfort, severely decreased urine output and feeling thirsty etc. (signs of a treatment-related allergic reaction).

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Chronic renal failure.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Recurrence (reactivation) of hepatitis B infection when you have had hepatitis B in the past (a liver infection).

p.span: If you get any of the above, tell your doctor straight away.
(may affect more than 1 in 10 people)

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Headache or feeling tired.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Feeling sick (nausea), being sick (vomiting), diarrhoea or indigestion.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Rash.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Muscle cramps or joint, muscle or bone pain,
during treatment with ProductX CompanyY or after you have stopped taking ProductX CompanyY.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Swelling such as round your ankles or puffy eyes.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Weight gain.

p.span: If any of these affects you severely, tell your doctor.
(may affect up to 1 in 10 people)

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Anorexia, weight loss or a disturbed sense of taste.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Feeling dizzy or weak.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Difficulty in sleeping (insomnia).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Discharge from the eye with itching, redness and swelling (conjunctivitis), watery eyes or having blurred vision.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Nose bleeds.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Pain or swelling in your abdomen, flatulence, heartburn or constipation.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Itching.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Unusual hair loss or thinning.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Numbness of the hands or feet.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Mouth ulcers.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Joint pain with swelling.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Dry mouth, dry skin or dry eye.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Decreased or increased skin sensitivity.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Hot flushes, chills or night sweats.

p.span: If any of these affects you severely, tell your doctor.

p.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

p.span: (may affect up to 1 in 100 people):

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Cough, runny or stuffy nose, feeling of heaviness or pain on pressing the area above the eyes or on the sides of the nose, nasal congestion, sneezing, sore throat, with or without headache (signs of upper respiratory tract infection).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Severe headache felt as a throbbing pain or pulsing sensation, usually on one side of the head and often accompanied by nausea, vomiting and sensitivity to light or sound (signs of migraine).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Flu-like symptoms (influenza).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Pain or burning sensation while passing urine, increased body temperature, pain in groin or pelvic area, red- or brown-coloured or cloudy urine (signs of urinary tract infection).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Pain and swelling of your joints (signs of arthralgia).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: A constant feeling of sadness and loss of interest, which stops you carrying out your normal activities (signs of depression).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: A feeling of apprehension and worry along with physical symptoms such as pounding heart, sweating, trembling, dry mouth (signs of anxiety).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Sleepiness/drowsiness/excessive sleep.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Trembling or shaky movements (tremor).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Memory impairment.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Overwhelming urge to move the legs (restless leg syndrome).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Hearing noises (e.g. ringing, humming) in the ears that have no external source (tinnitus).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: High blood pressure (hypertension).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Burping/belching.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Inflammation of the lips.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Difficulty swallowing.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Increased sweating.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Skin discolouration.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Brittle nails.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Red bumps or white-headed pimples around the roots of the hair, possibly with pain, itching or
burning sensation (signs of inflammation of the hair follicles, also called folliculitis).

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Skin rash with flaking or peeling (exfoliative dermatitis).

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Breast enlargement (may occur in men or women).

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Dull pain and/or feeling of heaviness in the testicles or lower abdomen, pain during urination, sexual intercourse or ejaculation, blood in urine (signs of oedema of the testicles).

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Inability to get or keep an erection (erectile dysfunction).

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Heavy or irregular menstrual periods.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Difficulty achieving/maintaining sexual arousal.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Decreased sexual desire.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Nipple pain.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Generally feeling unwell (malaise).

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Viral infection such as cold sore.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Lower back pain resulting from kidney disorder.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Increased frequency of passing urine.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Increase in appetite.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Pain or burning sensation in upper abdomen and/or chest (heartburn), nausea, vomiting, acid reflux, feeling of fullness and bloating, black-coloured stools (signs of stomach ulcer).

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Joint and muscle stiffness.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Abnormal laboratory test results.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Painful red lumps on the skin, skin pain, skin reddening (inflammation of fatty tissue under the skin).

p.span: If any of these affects you severely, tell your doctor.

p.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

p.span: (may affect up to 1 in 1,000 people):

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Confusion.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Nail discolouration.

p.span: If any of these affects you severely, tell your doctor.
frequency cannot be estimated from the available data)

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Reddening and/or swelling on the palms of the hands and soles of the feet which may be accompanied by tingling sensation and burning pain.

li.style: margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; text-align: left; font-size: 12pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Painful and/or blistering skin lesions.

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;
li.span: Slowing of growth in children and adolescents.

p.span: If any of these affects you severely, tell your doctor.

If you get any side effects, talk to your doctor, pharmacist or nurse. This includes any possible side effects not listed in this leaflet. You can also report side effects directly via the national reporting system listed in
. By reporting side effects, you can help provide more information on the safety of this medicine.

div.p: Keep this medicine out of the sight and reach of children.

p.span: Do not use
this medicine
after the expiry date which is stated on the carton and blister after EXP. The expiry date refers to the last day of the month.
This medicine does not require any special storage conditions.

div.p: Do not use any pack that is damaged or shows signs of tampering.

p.span: Do not throw away any medicines via wastewater or household waste. Ask your pharmacist how to throw away medicines you no longer use. These measures will help protect the environment.

title.value: 6. Contents of the pack and other information

display.value: 6. Contents of the pack and other information

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;

ul.li: The active substance is imatinib (as mesilate).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;

ul.li: Each hard capsule of ProductX CompanyY contains 100 mg imatinib (as mesilate).

li.style: line-height: normal; margin: 0cm 0cm 0.0001pt 0px; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif; text-indent: 13.7953px;

ul.li: The other ingredients are mannitol, crospovidone, magnesium stearate and silica colloidal anhydrous. The capsule shell is composed of gelatin, titanium dioxide (E171), iron oxide yellow (E172) and iron oxide red (E172). The printing ink is composed of shellac, iron oxide black (E172) and propylene glycol.

title.value: What ProductX CompanyY looks like and contents of the pack

display.value: What X looks like and contents of the pack

div.p: ProductX CompanyY 100 mg hard capsules are non transparent orange capsules with black marking 7629 on capsule body and black marking TEVA on capsule cap. The content of the capsule is white to light yellow granulated powder. The capsules are approximately 19 mm long and 7 mm wide.
ProductX CompanyY 100 mg hard capsules are available in pack sizes of 60 or 120 hard capsules in blisters.
ProductX CompanyY 100 mg hard capsules are available in pack sizes of 20x1, 60x1, 120x1 or 180x1 hard capsules in perforated unit dose blisters.
Not all pack sizes may be marketed.

p.style: margin: 0cm -0.1pt 0.0001pt 0cm; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

margin: 0cm -0.1pt 0.0001pt 0cm; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

10000 Zagreb

div.p: For any information about this medicine, please contact the local representative of the Marketing Authorisation Holder:

display.value: This leaflet was last revised in [{MM/YYYY}][{month YYYY}].

p.style: margin: 0cm -0.1pt 0.0001pt 0cm; line-height: normal; font-size: 11pt; font-family: 'Times New Roman', serif;

div.p: Detailed information on this medicine is available on the European Medicines Agency website: http://www.ema.europa.eu
